operator_id: short self-chosen identifier for the reporting operator
repository_reference: the operator's repo (org/name), or a redacted reference if the operator prefers not to disclose it
branch_protection_evidence: description or reference confirming the check above is configured as a required status check on the operator's protected branch

valid_path_evidence.pr_reference: PR URL or redacted reference showing a VALID result
valid_path_evidence.proof_artifact_reference: MERGE_GUARD_PROOF.json artifact name/hash for that run

null_path_evidence.pr_reference: PR URL or redacted reference showing a NULL result
null_path_evidence.proof_artifact_reference: MERGE_GUARD_PROOF.json artifact name/hash for that run

operator_statement: in the operator's own words: what becomes worse in their workflow if Merge Guard is removed (or 'not applicable' if not yet at stage 6)
notes: any caveats, scope limitations, or follow-up actions
